docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY CABRERA, LORENA ALEMAN, ELSY DBA  TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT'S SON LUIS HERNANDEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON HER BEHALF. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CABRERA, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN, ELSY DBA  TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CABRERA, LORENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-12-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALEMAN, ELSY DBA  TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CABRERA, LORENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALEMAN, ELSY DBA  TRANSPORTES SALVADORENO SUCHITLAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
